'''鈭歽-w-v''' ('''kayawav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:foray|foray]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-w-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foray|foray]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-w-v
|-
! Lemma
| kayawav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyawav|thiyawav]] || [[word:jiyawav|jiyawav]] || [[word:shiyawav|shiyawav]] || [[word:kiyawav|kiyawav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyawav|thuthuyawav]] || [[word:jujuyawav|jujuyawav]] || [[word:shushuyawav|shushuyawav]] || [[word:kukuyawav|kukuyawav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyawav|thuyawav]] || [[word:juyawav|juyawav]] || [[word:shuyawav|shuyawav]] || [[word:kuyawav|kuyawav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyawav|thuyawav]] || [[word:juyawav|juyawav]] || [[word:shuyawav|shuyawav]] || [[word:kuyawav|kuyawav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyawav|theyawav]] || [[word:jeyawav|jeyawav]] || [[word:sheyawav|sheyawav]] || [[word:keyawav|keyawav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyawav|thothoyawav]] || [[word:jojoyawav|jojoyawav]] || [[word:shoshoyawav|shoshoyawav]] || [[word:kokoyawav|kokoyawav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyawav|thoyawav]] || [[word:joyawav|joyawav]] || [[word:shoyawav|shoyawav]] || [[word:koyawav|koyawav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyawav|thoyawav]] || [[word:joyawav|joyawav]] || [[word:shoyawav|shoyawav]] || [[word:koyawav|koyawav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙yawav|th忙yawav]] || [[word:j忙yawav|j忙yawav]] || [[word:sh忙yawav|sh忙yawav]] || [[word:k忙yawav|k忙yawav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayawav|thathayawav]] || [[word:jajayawav|jajayawav]] || [[word:shashayawav|shashayawav]] || [[word:kakayawav|kakayawav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayawav|thayawav]] || [[word:jayawav|jayawav]] || [[word:shayawav|shayawav]] || [[word:kayawav|kayawav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayawav|thayawav]] || [[word:jayawav|jayawav]] || [[word:shayawav|shayawav]] || [[word:kayawav|kayawav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayawav|shayawav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayawav|goshayawav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayawav|gokishayawav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayawavn眉|shayawavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayawavnkn眉|goshayawavnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayawavn眉|gokishayawavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayawavsh毛|shayawavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayawavnksh毛|goshayawavnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayawavsh毛|gokishayawavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayawavro|shayawavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayawavnkro|goshayawavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayawavro|gokishayawavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayawavmu|shayawavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayawavnkmu|goshayawavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayawavmu|gokishayawavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayawavsher|shayawavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayawavnksher|goshayawavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayawavsher|gokishayawavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayawavng|shayawavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayawavnkng|goshayawavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayawavng|gokishayawavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayawavya|shayawavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayawavnkya|goshayawavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayawavya|gokishayawavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayawavyam|shayawavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayawavnkyam|goshayawavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayawavyam|gokishayawavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayawavn眉sh毛|shayawavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayawavnkn眉sh毛|goshayawavnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayawavn眉sh毛|gokishayawavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayawavn眉ro|shayawavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayawavnkn眉ro|goshayawavnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayawavn眉ro|gokishayawavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayawavn眉mu|shayawavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayawavnkn眉mu|goshayawavnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayawavn眉mu|gokishayawavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayawavsh毛n眉|shayawavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayawavnksh毛n眉|goshayawavnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayawavsh毛n眉|gokishayawavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayawavsh毛ro|shayawavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayawavnksh毛ro|goshayawavnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayawavsh毛ro|gokishayawavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayawavsh毛mu|shayawavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayawavnksh毛mu|goshayawavnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayawavsh毛mu|gokishayawavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayawavron眉|shayawavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayawavnkron眉|goshayawavnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayawavron眉|gokishayawavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayawavrosh毛|shayawavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayawavnkrosh毛|goshayawavnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayawavrosh毛|gokishayawavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayawavromu|shayawavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayawavnkromu|goshayawavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayawavromu|gokishayawavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayawavmun眉|shayawavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayawavnkmun眉|goshayawavnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayawavmun眉|gokishayawavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayawavmush毛|shayawavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayawavnkmush毛|goshayawavnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayawavmush毛|gokishayawavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayawavmuro|shayawavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayawavnkmuro|goshayawavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayawavmuro|gokishayawavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
